title: coronopus lepidioides
intro: Coronopus lepidioides, also known as small-leafed orache, is a type of annual plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coronopus lepidioides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
